title: Create Train Tank Mod
description: This mod adds round blocks, which may be used for building create trains.
body:
This mod is **supposed** to be used in **combination** with the **create mod**.

All blocks can be obtained by crafting.
![Crafting recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4746a0130137fbe22d3178bbde10a15e714fba99.png)

# Create Train Tank Mod

Create Train Tank Mod adds large decorative and functional train tank blocks for Fabric 1.21.1. The tanks are designed for Create-style rail builds, depots, factories, and storage yards where standard blocks do not quite match the scale of a train-mounted tank.

## Features

- Black, red, green, blue, and copper tank blocks
- Horizontal and vertical placement
- Vertical cylinder stacking for tower-style tanks
- Built-in liquid storage for every tank block
- Bucket and Fabric fluid container interaction
- Fabric Transfer API fluid storage support for compatible pipes and machines
- Comparator output based on fill level
- Survival recipes using Create industrial iron

## Liquid Storage

Each tank stores one fluid type at a time and holds up to 8 buckets. Right-click with buckets or compatible fluid containers to fill or drain the tank. Empty-hand right-click shows the current stored fluid and amount.

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.1
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- Create is recommended for survival recipes, since the recipes use `create:industrial_iron_block`.

## Notes

This mod is focused on train-themed tank blocks with practical fluid storage while keeping the block set simple and easy to use in builds.
